title: Faithful Emissive
body:
Emissive for Faithful 32x and 64x.

Two versions available:
In the normal version, the emissive effect has been added to many blocks, items and mobs. No emissive ores. Only redstone, if activated.

In the **Emissive AO** version, emissive has also been added to all ores.

The following mods are required for the resource pack to work:\
Forge: Optifine\
Fabric: [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity) and [[ETF] Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures)
